compiled_state.title: Update sprint/SKILL.md Phase 3 Batch Preparation with manual:awaiting_user filter note
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Add a note to sprint/SKILL.md Phase 3 (Batch Preparation) documenting the manual:awaiting_user story filter behavior, adjacent to the existing design:awaiting_import filter logic.

## File
plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md

## Insertion context
Phase 3 (Batch Preparation) starts at line ~1106. The existing design:awaiting_import filter is at lines ~835-856 (within Phase 2 sub-sections). Search for TAG_AWAITING_IMPORT and the comment pattern '# TAG_AWAITING_IMPORT=design:awaiting_import' — this is where design:awaiting_import filtering is documented. Add an adjacent note immediately after:

'When planning.external_dependency_block_enabled=true: stories tagged manual:awaiting_user are also excluded from the autonomous batch. After autonomous stories drain, sprint presents a blocking manual-pause handshake listing per-story instructions + verification_command. Accepts: done, done <story-id>, skip. Handles verification_command execution (timeout: planning.verification_command_timeout_seconds, default 30s) and confirmation-token audit logging. Topological sort surfaces manual stories before their dependents. Schema: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md.'

Note: sprint/SKILL.md does not have a Quick Reference table — this note goes inline in the Phase 3 body, adjacent to the design:awaiting_import filter.

## Done Definitions
- When complete, sprint/SKILL.md Phase 3 (or the batch filter section) contains a note documenting manual:awaiting_user filter behavior when planning.external_dependency_block_enabled=true
- When complete, the note references planning.verification_command_timeout_seconds and plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md
- When complete, check-skill-refs.sh passes on sprint/SKILL.md

## Testing
testing_mode: GREEN
Structural boundary test: grep plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md for 'manual:awaiting_user' and 'planning.external_dependency_block_enabled' — both must be present.

## Considerations
- [Accuracy] The filter is adjacent to design:awaiting_import; find the TAG_AWAITING_IMPORT constant definition and add a sibling constant or adjacent prose comment for manual:awaiting_user
- [Maintainability] Sprint SKILL.md has no Quick Reference table — use inline prose in the relevant phase section, following the pattern of how design:awaiting_import is documented at lines 835-856
